input.instructions: Perform an intensive search in academic databases (arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP, etc.) for the theoretical parameters defining the 'classicality' of single-photon Hawking radiation. Specifically, look for dimensionless constants related to photon statistics, Wigner function negativity, or squeezing parameters. Your goal is to identify exactly three universal dimensionless constants and provide their exact numerical values.

orchestration.decision_notes: I do not have access to external academic databases like arXiv or INSPIRE-HEP to perform real-time intensive searches. I can only provide information based on my internal training data. I cannot guarantee the identification of 'exactly three universal dimensionless constants' as requested, as this is a highly specific theoretical research task that requires live literature review.
